name: openmark-router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing for OpenClaw. Routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data — accuracy, cost, latency, stability — not keyword heuristics or complexity tiers. Plugin registers a route_task tool and auto-injects benchmark categories. LLM classifies tasks, code handles everything else: provider detection, routing math, model switching, fallback setup, routing card. Supports direct API providers and OpenRouter. 5 routing strategies. Zero external dependencies.
author: openmarkai
